basic_details.job_title: SVPUAT Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 99 Assistant, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture & Technology (SVPUAT), Meerut
basic_details.post_name: Director & Joint Director (Directorate of Research), Director & Joint Director (Directorate of Extension), Subject Matter Specialist/T6 (9 disciplines), Farm Manager/T4, Programme Assistant (Computer)/T4, Programme Assistant (Lab Technician)/T4, Assistant, Stenographer Grade-III, Driver/T1, Account Officer, Assistant Registrar
basic_details.total_vacancies: 99 Posts - 62 (Advt. IX/2026) + 2 (Advt. X/2026) + additional posts under Advt. I, II & VIII/2026 (31+4)
basic_details.job_type: Permanent (Account Officer, Assistant Registrar, Director/Joint Director) and Temporary, 100% ICAR-funded (KVK posts - Farm Manager, Programme Assistant, Assistant, Stenographer, Driver, Subject Matter Specialist)
basic_details.short_information: SVPUAT Meerut Recruitment 2026 is currently in the Application Open stage. Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture & Technology (SVPUAT), Meerut has released a combined set of five advertisements (Advertisement No. I, II, VIII, IX and X of 2026) inviting online applications for Director & Joint Director, Subject Matter Specialist, Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK) non-technical staff, Account Officer and Assistant Registrar posts. The online application window opened on 03.07.2026 and closes on 03.08.2026 (11:59:59 PM).

important_dates.application_start_date: Not Announced Yet (separately from issuing date)
important_dates.exam_date: Not Announced Yet (to be published on university website and sent via SMS)

age_limit.details: Account Officer, Assistant Registrar (Advt. X/2026): Maximum 40 years Farm Manager, Programme Assistant, Assistant, Stenographer Grade-III, Driver (Advt. IX/2026): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 40 years Subject Matter Specialist / T6 (Advt. VIII/2026): Maximum 40 years Director, Joint Director (Advt. I/2026 & II/2026): No upper age limit | 05 years relaxation for OBC (Non-creamy Layer) and SC/ST category candidates 15 years relaxation for Persons with Disability (PWD) 05 years relaxation for regular employees of the State of Uttar Pradesh, as per applicable Government Order

qualification.details: post name: Essential Qualification | director, directorate of research / extension: Ph.D. in any branch of Agricultural Sciences or a related field with a consistently good academic record; at least 15 years of Teaching/Research/Extension (T/R/E) experience from a recognized Government institution, of which 5 years must be at the level of Professor or equivalent; minimum 15 research publications in peer-reviewed or NAAS-rated journals. | joint director, directorate of research / extension: Ph.D. in any branch of Agricultural Sciences or a related field; minimum 10 years of T/R/E experience as Assistant Professor/Associate Professor/Professor or equivalent, including at least 2 years as Associate Professor or equivalent; minimum 10 research publications in peer-reviewed or NAAS-rated journals. | subject matter specialist / t6 (all 9 disciplines): Master's degree in the relevant discipline (Agricultural Extension, Agronomy, Horticulture, Plant Protection/allied field, Fisheries Science, Veterinary/Animal Science, Home Science, Soil Science, or Genetics & Plant Breeding) from a recognized university. Working knowledge of computers is desirable. | farm manager / t4: Bachelor's degree in Agriculture or any other branch of science/social science relevant to Agriculture from a recognized university. | programme assistant (computer) / t4: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science / Computer Application or equivalent qualification from a recognized university. | programme assistant (lab technician) / t4: Bachelor's degree in Agriculture or any other branch of science/social science relevant to Agriculture from a recognized university. | assistant: Bachelor's degree from a recognized university. | stenographer grade-iii: 12th class pass or equivalent from a recognized Board/University, plus a dictation and typing test at 80 wpm (English/Hindi). | driver / t1: Matriculation pass from a recognized board, plus a valid and appropriate driving licence; must pass a practical skill test. | account officer: Bachelor's and Master's degree in Commerce/Economics/Finance from a UGC-recognized university, OR a professional qualification such as CA/ICWA/CMA from a recognized institution. | assistant registrar: Master's degree from a UGC-recognized university with at least 55% marks (or equivalent grade).

salary_details.director (research/extension): Level 14, rationalized entry pay of Rs. 1,44,200/- + 02 increments
salary_details.joint director (research/extension): Level 14, rationalized entry pay of Rs. 1,44,200/-
salary_details.subject matter specialist / t6: Pay Band-3, Rs. 15,600–39,100, Grade Pay Rs. 5,400/-
salary_details.details: KVK posts (Farm Manager, Programme Assistants, Assistant, Stenographer, Driver, Subject Matter Specialist) are 100% funded by the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR), and the pay scale/service benefits will be as permitted by ICAR.

selection_process: Non-Teaching & KVK Non-Technical Posts: Selection is based on Academic Score (maximum 60 marks) plus a Written Examination (maximum 180–250 marks depending on the post) plus an Interview (maximum 60 marks). For Stenographer Grade-III and Driver posts

a dictation/typing test or driving skill test is also conducted. Subject Matter Specialist / T6: Selection is based on a Score Card (Academic Qualifications + Research Performance/Publications + Professional Experience + Extra-Curricular Activities)

and an Interview. A minimum score of 50% (General/OBC) or 45% (SC/ST/PWD) in Parts A+B+C is required to qualify for interview. Director / Joint Director: Selection is based on a Score Card (Academic Qualifications
a PowerPoint presentation on work done and vision

and an Interview. Candidates are shortlisted for interview in a ratio of 1:10 based on merit after screening. Candidates must appear for the written examination; those who do not appear will not be considered for shortlisting. Information about examination dates
admit cards and skill tests will be published only on the university website and recruitment portal
and sent via SMS to the registered mobile number - not through newspapers.
how_to_apply: Visit the official SVPUAT website: www.svpuat.edu.in
Click on the 'Recruitment' link on the Home Page.
Click on 'View Advertisement' to read the detailed notification relevant to your desired post carefully.
Click on the 'Apply' button, which will redirect you to the recruitment portal: www.recruitmentsvpuat.in
Click on 'Applicant's Registration' and complete the registration process. Note down your Application ID and password.
Log in using your Application ID and password.
Fill in Personal Details, Educational Qualifications, Experience, Sports/NCC/NSS details (if applicable) and Score Card information.
Upload your photograph, signature and required certificates in the specified format and file size.
Preview the filled application and correct any errors using the 'Edit' option before payment.
Pay the applicable application fee online.
Submit the form. No changes are possible after fee payment/submission.
Download and print the final submitted application form.

Send the printed application form with all enclosures, in an A4-size envelope, by registered post to: Director, Administration & Monitoring, SVP University of Agriculture & Technology, Meerut-250110 (U.P.), on or before 17.08.2026, clearly mentioning the Advertisement Number and Post applied for.
important_instructions: It is mandatory to send the hard copy of the application form; failing to do so will mean the candidature is not considered further. A separate application form and separate fee are required for each post; applications for two different posts must not be combined in one envelope. Reservation will be applicable as per Uttar Pradesh Government rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PWD candidates. OBC and EWS candidates must submit current-year certificates in the prescribed UP Government proforma. Furnishing false information or using unfair means at any stage will lead to summary rejection and possible legal/disciplinary action. The University reserves the right to increase, decrease, add, or withdraw any advertised post at any time. No travel allowance will be paid for attending the written examination or interview. Any corrigendum, addendum, or cancellation will be published only on the official website and recruitment portal - not in newspapers. Candidates should check the website regularly. KVK posts are temporary and linked to the continuance of ICAR scheme funding; on closure of a KVK, services will be terminated automatically, and the University will not absorb such candidates in any other capacity.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Non-Teaching & KVK Non-Technical Posts: Selection is based on Academic Score (maximum 60 marks) plus a Written Examination (maximum 180–250 marks depending on the post) plus an Interview (maximum 60 marks). For Stenographer Grade-III and Driver posts, a dictation/typing test or driving skill test is also conducted. Subject Matter Specialist / T6: Selection is based on a Score Card (Academic Qualifications + Research Performance/Publications + Professional Experience + Extra-Curricular Activities), a PowerPoint presentation, and an Interview. A minimum score of 50% (General/OBC) or 45% (SC/ST/PWD) in Parts A+B+C is required to qualify for interview. Director / Joint Director: Selection is based on a Score Card (Academic Qualifications, Research Performance and Publication, Teaching/Research/Extension experience), a PowerPoint presentation on work done and vision, and an Interview. Candidates are shortlisted for interview in a ratio of 1:10 based on merit after screening. Candidates must appear for the written examination; those who do not appear will not be considered for shortlisting. Information about examination dates, admit cards and skill tests will be published only on the university website and recruitment portal, and sent via SMS to the registered mobile number - not through newspapers.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Recent passport-size colour photograph and signature (self-attested, uploaded online) Mark sheets and certificates for all academic qualifications (High School onwards) Caste certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS) in the prescribed UP Government proforma, where applicable PWD certificate, if claiming reservation/relaxation for disability Experience certificates, where applicable No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the current employer, in the prescribed format, for candidates already in service Printed copy of the duly filled online application form with self-assessed Score Card Research publications, award certificates and proof of special attainments (for teaching/scientific posts)

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: It is mandatory to send the hard copy of the application form; failing to do so will mean the candidature is not considered further. A separate application form and separate fee are required for each post; applications for two different posts must not be combined in one envelope. Reservation will be applicable as per Uttar Pradesh Government rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PWD candidates. OBC and EWS candidates must submit current-year certificates in the prescribed UP Government proforma. Furnishing false information or using unfair means at any stage will lead to summary rejection and possible legal/disciplinary action. The University reserves the right to increase, decrease, add, or withdraw any advertised post at any time. No travel allowance will be paid for attending the written examination or interview. Any corrigendum, addendum, or cancellation will be published only on the official website and recruitment portal - not in newspapers. Candidates should check the website regularly. KVK posts are temporary and linked to the continuance of ICAR scheme funding; on closure of a KVK, services will be terminated automatically, and the University will not absorb such candidates in any other capacity.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SVPUAT Meerut Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application last date is 03.08.2026 (up to 11:59:59 PM). The printed application form must reach the university by registered post on or before 17.08.2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many advertisements are included in this SVPUAT recruitment notification?
faq.answer: This notification set includes five advertisements: Advt. No. I/2026 and II/2026 (Director & Joint Director), Advt. No. VIII/2026 (Subject Matter Specialist), Advt. No. IX/2026 (KVK non-technical posts), and Advt. No. X/2026 (Account Officer & Assistant Registrar).

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies in SVPUAT Meerut Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: 62 vacancies are confirmed under Advertisement No. IX/2026 (KVK non-technical posts) and 2 vacancies under Advertisement No. X/2026 (Account Officer and Assistant Registrar). Additional posts are available under Advt. No. I, II, and VIII/2026; candidates should check the official PDF for exact category-wise numbers for these three advertisements.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for SVPUAT Meerut Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee ranges from Rs. 1,000/- to Rs. 1,500/- for General/OBC/EWS candidates and Rs. 500/- to Rs. 750/- for SC/ST/PWD candidates, depending on the advertisement. See the Application Fee section above for the exact fee applicable to each post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for SVPUAT Meerut Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post: 18–40 years for KVK non-technical posts, up to 40 years for Account Officer, Assistant Registrar and Subject Matter Specialist posts, and no upper age limit for Director/Joint Director posts.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for SVPUAT Meerut Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Qualification requirements range from Matriculation (for Driver) and 12th pass (for Stenographer Grade-III) to a Bachelor's/Master's degree (for Account Officer, Assistant Registrar, Farm Manager, Programme Assistant, Assistant, Subject Matter Specialist) and a Ph.D. with extensive research/teaching experience (for Director and Joint Director posts).

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for SVPUAT Meerut Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through www.recruitmentsvpuat.in, accessed via the 'Recruitment' link on www.svpuat.edu.in. See the How to Apply section above for the complete step-by-step process.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for SVPUAT Meerut Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on Academic Score, a Written Examination and/or Skill Test, and an Interview, with the exact weightage varying by post. Director and Joint Director posts additionally require a PowerPoint presentation before the selection committee.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for SVPUAT Meerut Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application last date is 03.08.2026 (up to 11:59:59 PM). The printed application form must reach the university by registered post on or before 17.08.2026.
